'''bav챦fy챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llanero|llanero]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llanero|llanero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| bav챦fy챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦fth|bav챦fy챦fth]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦fj|bav챦fy챦fj]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦fsh|bav챦fy챦fsh]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f|bav챦fy챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:bav챦fv챦fy챦fth|bav챦fv챦fy챦fth]] || [[word:bav챦fv챦fy챦fj|bav챦fv챦fy챦fj]] || [[word:bav챦fv챦fy챦fsh|bav챦fv챦fy챦fsh]] || [[word:bav챦fv챦fy챦f|bav챦fv챦fy챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦fth|bav챦fy챦fth]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦fj|bav챦fy챦fj]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦fsh|bav챦fy챦fsh]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f|bav챦fy챦f]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f|bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f|bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f|bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f|bav챦fy챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦fn|bav챦fy챦f챦fn]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦fn|bav챦fy챦f챦fn]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦fn|bav챦fy챦f챦fn]] || [[word:bav챦fy챦f챦fn|bav챦fy챦f챦fn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c579b50}}
